panels.description: Wide shot: A dusty, abandoned stone chamber illuminated by brilliant moonlight. Protagonist in foreground looking at three elegant women standing in the moonbeams. The women cast no shadows on the floor.

bubbles.text: I was not alone... and they threw no shadow on the floor.

panels.description: Medium shot: The three women lean in closer, their faces partially obscured by shadows. One dark-haired with piercing eyes, one golden-haired with sapphire eyes. Protagonist looks on with wide-eyed curiosity and rising fear.
Close up: The women whisper together, their faces twisted into unnatural, silvery, hard smiles. Moonlight accentuates the sharpness of their features.

bubbles.text: He is young and strong; there are kisses for us all.

panels.description: Medium close up: The fair-haired girl kneels, looking down at the protagonist with a mixture of desire and predatory intent, licking her scarlet lips with a red tongue.

bubbles.text: Go on! Yours is the right to begin.

panels.description: Close up: The fair girl's face inches from the protagonist's throat. Her sharp teeth are visible. Extreme tension, high contrast lighting.

bubbles.text: I could feel the movement of her breath...
